data.title: BNB price may rebound to $625-$650 in March 2026 from oversold status at $607.81 with RSI 29.53.
data.description: BNB is currently trading at $607.81, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 29.53 indicating oversold conditions. According to technical analysis, there could be a potential rebound to the $625-$650 range as momentum indicators hint at a possible reversal.

data.title: Ethereum at $1,955, oversold RSI at 33.64. Potential bounce to $2,200 resistance predicted as bears control below $2,030.
data.description: The current price of Ethereum (ETH) stands at $1,955, while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 33.64, indicating oversold conditions. Technical analysis indicates a possible rebound towards the $2,200 resistance level. However, bearish control persists below $2,030.

data.title: Bitcoin aims for $70,000 recovery after RSI reset at 35.54. Currently trading at $67,382, key resistance break may lead to $70K test in 2 weeks.
data.description: The current trading price of Bitcoin stands at $67,382, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicating a neutral position at 35.54, which hints at the potential for an oversold rebound. Analysis of the technical aspects suggests that if the crucial resistance level is breached, there is a likelihood of testing the $70,000 mark within a span of two weeks.

data.title: Sika reveals 2025 full-year results, focusing on growth acceleration plan per SIX Exchange Regulation Listing Rules.
data.description: In compliance with Article 53 of the SIX Exchange Regulation Listing Rules, an ad hoc announcement has been made by Sika regarding their full-year 2025 financial performance. Sika has reported its results for the mentioned period and has outlined its strategy to expedite growth. Key financial figures such as revenue, profit, and any other relevant metrics should be presented concisely along with the company's future plans and objectives.

data.title: XRP price at $1.41, targeting $1.47 breakout with $2.60 by year-end forecasted, signaling potential recovery.
data.description: XRP is currently priced at $1.41 and showing conflicting indicators. Analysts suggest that a breach of the $1.47 resistance level is crucial for a positive trend, potentially leading towards the year-end targets of $2.60.

data.title: Coor invites to Capital Markets Day on Mar 19, 2026 in Solna, Sweden, starting at 13:00, available in person or webcast.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, the Coor Service Management Holding AB (publ) has scheduled its Capital Markets Day to be held on March 19, 2026, at the firm's headquarters in Solna, Sweden. This event offers the option to attend in person or through a webcast. The presentations are set to commence at 13:00.

data.title: In 2025, illicit stablecoin activity surged to $141B, with networks evading sanctions and laundering money. - TRM Labs
data.description: TRM Labs has revealed that illicit stablecoin usage has been primarily fueled by sanctions evasion networks, guarantee marketplaces, and extensive money laundering operations. These activities have significantly contributed to the rise in illicit stablecoin transactions, with a noticeable impact on the overall market.

data.title: Aker Solutions secures a major 5-year MMO contract with Aker BP for Norwegian Continental Shelf assets.
data.description: In Norway, on February 20, 2026, Aker Solutions secured a significant five-year contract from Aker BP for Maintenance, Modification, and Operation services (MMO). This extensive contract includes servicing all pivotal assets of Aker BP on the Norwegian Continental Shelf, encompassing the recently launched Yggdrasil.

data.title: Xerox declares quarterly dividend of $0.025/share on Common Stock and $20.00/share on Preferred Stock. Payable on specific dates.
data.description: Xerox Holdings Corporation (NASDAQ: XRX) has disclosed that its board of directors has approved quarterly dividends for shareholders. For Xerox Holdings Corporation Common Stock, a dividend of $0.025 per share has been announced, with payment scheduled for April 30, 2026, for shareholders recorded as of March 31, 2026. Additionally, for the outstanding Xerox Holdings Series A Convertible Perpetual Preferred Stock, a dividend of $20.00 per share has been declared, payable on April 1, 2026.
